untranslatable_reason: EEDT pattern requires visual peak identification and multi-bar formation analysis that cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator values. Requires: (1) identification of highest high on left peak (requires lookback window and peak detection), (2) identification of lowest low at breakout point (requires pattern state tracking), (3) dynamic calculation of target price based on pattern geometry. The entry condition 'wait for breakout confirmation' requires pattern completion detection. Standard indicators cannot express these multi-bar geometric pattern requirements.
translation_notes: Signal describes a visual candlestick pattern (EEDT - Equidistant Equally-spaced Descending Tops) that requires identifying geometric relationships across multiple bars. The entry logic depends on pattern formation completion, and the exit target is calculated dynamically from pattern measurements. Example exit price (25.77) provided but would vary per occurrence. Backtest engine would need custom pattern recognition logic or vectorized pattern detection beyond standard technical indicators.
